tests.name: round_trip_parse_print
tests.description: Parse/print idempotency for integer literal, if-else, and function call

tests.name: type_soundness_verification
tests.description: Hindley-Milner inference produces judgments without errors

tests.name: compile_hello_world
tests.description: Full pipeline: parse -> check -> codegen -> bytecode for `let greeting = 42`

tests.name: compile_fibonacci
tests.description: Nested arithmetic compilation and semantic evaluation for `let fib = add(add(1, 1), add(1, 2))`

tests.name: compile_symbolic_expression
tests.description: Conditional with nested calls for `let result = if eq(add(1, 2), 3) { 1 } else { 0 }`

tests.name: effect_checking_integration
tests.description: Effect checker processes arithmetic expression without errors

tests.name: pattern_matching_integration
tests.description: Boolean match exhaustiveness verified as complete
